overview: Forestheals is a premium Ayurvedic eCommerce platform with a fully synced backend-driven storefront and admin panel. All products, orders, customers, and analytics flow from the backend in real time.
features: Real-time product sync between admin and storefront
Full order lifecycle management with status tracking
Customer OTP authentication with real email persistence
Admin panel with live orders, customers, and analytics
Customer profile with persistent data across devices
Premium About page with team and HQ info
